theme_and_archetype.vibe: Vercel, Stripe, Vellum - Premium, Data-heavy, Minimalist, Highly Readable

rules.headings: Cabinet Grotesk or Geist (E1 Anti-Default Rule: Inter prohibited for headings)
rules.mono: JetBrains Mono (for code, benchmarks, numerical data)

spacing_and_layout.containers: Use max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8

data_tables.header: Sticky header, text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-400 border-b border-white/10 bg-[#1a1a1a]/95 backdrop-blur
data_tables.numbers: Right-aligned, tabular-nums for vertical decimal alignment

charts.type: Pure CSS/SVG based (NO external libraries like Recharts or Chart.js)
charts.bar_charts: Use flexbox with percentage widths and background colors (Orange/Teal)

badges.provider: Colored initials (e.g., 'OA' for OpenAI with bg-green-500/20 text-green-400), rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium
badges.category: Pill shape (rounded-full) with subtle border, bg-white (in light theme) or bg-white/10 (in dark theme), hover:bg-[#f26e2a]/10 hover:text-[#f26e2a] transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-[#f26e2a] hover:bg-[#d95a1e] text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors (Dark mode)

sections: Hero Section: text-center py-20, h1 title, subtitle, CTA to compare
Top Models Widgets: Bento grid, mini CSS bar charts, fastest/cheapest metric cards
Comparison Widget: Sticky or floating action bar to select 2+ models
Main Table: Sortable columns, fixed first column (model name), horizontal scroll on mobile
Benchmark Glossary: Accordion or grid of cards explaining MMLU, HumanEval, etc.
Filter Tabs: Scrollable horizontally on mobile. All / Comparisons / News / Guides / LLM Basics
Blog Cards: White bg, rounded-2xl, shadow-sm, image top, category pill overlay, title, excerpt, date/author
Footer: Dark mode (#1a1a1a) for stark contrast at the end
Article Layout: max-w-3xl mx-auto, large hero image
Typography: leading-relaxed, text-lg or text-xl for readability, generous paragraph spacing (mb-6)
Components: Inline code blocks (dark bg), blockquotes (left border orange)
Sidebar/Nav: Fixed left or top nav
CRUD Tables: Models and Posts management using the SaaS data table standard

image_urls.description: Dark blue/black grid vertical lines (use with low opacity bg-black/80 overlay for Leaderboard Hero)
Green grid on light gray, use for AI content feature blocks
Minimalist desk, rimless eyeglasses on notebook (good for placeholder blog post images)

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: Astro 6 + Tailwind CSS 4 + React islands + FastAPI + MongoDB. Provide React components compatible with Astro's island architecture.
NO EXTERNAL CHART LIBRARIES: Build all bar charts, comparison bars, and sparklines using pure CSS and SVGs.
TESTING ATTRIBUTES: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, table headers, filter tabs) using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., 'model-sort-button').
THEME SEGREGATION: Leaderboard and Admin MUST be dark theme. Blog listing and detail MUST be light theme (#F8F7F4 bg). Footer in light theme must be dark.
FONT RULES: Use 'Inter' strictly for body copy. Use a premium sans-serif like 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'Geist' for headings to maintain a high-end SaaS feel.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast in both modes (e.g. orange on dark grey). Use tabular-nums for numeric columns in the leaderboard.
SPACING: strictly adhere to 8px multiple scales (p-4, p-6, p-8, gap-8).
